title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 374.515 - Rules and regulations authorized
text:
374.515.  Rules and regulations authorized. — The director may promulgate such rules and regulations necessary to implement the provisions of sections 374.500 to 374.515, pursuant to the provisions of section 374.045 and chapter 536.
(L. 1991 S.B. 352 § 6 subsecs. 4 to 8, A.L. 1993 S.B. 52)
